request: How does order size vary by shipping method?
search_document:
User Request: How does order size vary by shipping method?

Dashboard Components:
Title: Order Size by Shipping Method
Type: chart
Description: Comparison of average order size across different shipping methods
Title: Shipping Method Breakdown
Type: table
Description: List of shipping methods with total orders and average order size
Title: Total Orders by Shipping Method
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders categorized by shipping method

sql_queries.title: Order Size by Shipping Method
sql_queries.description: Comparison of average order size across different shipping methods
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, AVG(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS AverageOrderSize FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Shipping Method Breakdown
sql_queries.description: List of shipping methods with total orders and average order size
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, AVG(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS AverageOrderSize FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Total Orders by Shipping Method
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders categorized by shipping method
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders o JOIN Shippers s ON o.ShipVia = s.ShipperID GROUP BY s.CompanyName
